statement: In every magma, Equation 591 (`x = y * (z * (w * (x * w)))`) implies Equation 4398 (`x * (x * y) = (x * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0400
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op x w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op (op x y) x)
